message:
test(btree): decouple swiss_index tests from global metrics, add coverage

Remove global btree_metrics_snapshot/reset_btree_metrics coupling from
swiss_index tests — these relied on mutable global state that made tests
order-dependent. Replace with direct load_factor_milli() assertions.

Add test_swiss_index_entry_or_insert_with and test_swiss_index_from_iter
to cover the entry API and FromIterator impl.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
